name: Channel the Fumarole
description: When you use Elemental Channeling, you may instead cast Stinking Cloud or Melf's Acid Arrow without expending a spell slot or requiring concentration. Stinking Cloud lasts 1 minute and you may slide the cloud up to 10 feet as a bonus action. Slag Step: until the end of your turn, you ignore sand, ash, and heated ground difficult terrain and have resistance to poison damage.
